eavsr 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Download and read EAVS data

download_eavs()
Download an EAVS cycle
read_eavs()
Read an EAVS cycle as a tidy tibble
eavs_codebook()
Read an EAVS codebook

Classify and aggregate

classify_jurisdiction()
Classify EAVS jurisdictions and derive county FIPS
aggregate_to_county()
Aggregate EAVS to county level

Metadata and citations

eavs_cycles()
EAVS survey cycles available in eavsr
eavs_crosswalk()
Cross-cycle variable crosswalk
cite_eavs()
Citation for an EAVS cycle

Cache management

eavs_cache_dir()
Local cache directory for EAVS files
eavs_cache_info() eavs_clear_cache()
Inspect or clear the EAVS cache

Data

crosswalk
Cross-cycle EAVS variable crosswalk
ct_planning_regions
Connecticut town-to-planning-region lookup
wi_subcounty_fips
Wisconsin sub-county to county FIPS lookup

On this page

Developed by Cameron Wimpy.
